debug_info.goal:
case swap
α : Type u_1
l1 l2 : List α
x y : α
l : List α
⊢ ∀ {idx1 : Fin (y :: x :: l).length} {idx2 : Fin (x :: y :: l).length},
    (y :: x :: l)[idx1] = (x :: y :: l)[idx2] → ((y :: x :: l).eraseIdx ↑idx1).Perm ((x :: y :: l).eraseIdx ↑idx2)

failed_attempts:
simp [List.eraseIdx_cons_succ]
              exact (List.Perm.swap _ a _).trans (List.Perm.cons a (h tl ⟨k, Nat.lt_of_succ_lt_succ hk⟩))
          exact List.Perm.of_cons ((h _ idx1).trans ((List.Perm.swap x y l).trans (heq ▸ (h _ idx2).symm)))

intros idx1 idx2 heq
          exact List.Perm.cons_inv (by
            rw [heq]
            exact (List.perm_cons_eraseIdx _ idx1).trans
              ((List.Perm.swap x y l).trans (List.perm_cons_eraseIdx _ idx2).symm))

simpa using hk⟩).cons hd |>.trans (List.Perm.swap _ _ _)
          exact List.Perm.cons_inv (by rw [← h]; exact (h_p idx1).symm.trans ((List.Perm.swap x y l).trans (h_p idx2)))

succ i ih => cases l with | nil => contradiction | cons hd tl =>
              simp [List.eraseIdx]; exact (List.Perm.cons _ (ih tl (Nat.lt_of_succ_lt_succ hi))).trans (List.Perm.swap _ _ _)
          have h := (hp _ idx1).symm.trans ((List.Perm.swap y x l).trans (hp _ idx2))
          rw [heq] at h; exact h.cons_inv

intro idx1 idx2 h
          have p (l : List α) (i : Fin l.length) : (l[i] :: l.eraseIdx i).Perm l := by
            rw [List.eraseIdx_eq_take_drop, ← List.perm_middle, List.take_append_getElem_append_drop]
          apply List.Perm.cons_inv (a := (x :: y :: l)[idx2])
          rw [← h]
          exact (p _ idx1).trans ((List.Perm.swap x y l).symm.trans (p _ idx2).symm)

simp only [List.getElem_cons_succ, List.eraseIdx_cons_succ]
                exact (List.Perm.cons _ (ih ⟨k, Nat.lt_of_succ_lt_succ h⟩)).trans (List.Perm.swap _ _ _)
          have h1 := pge _ idx1
          have h2 := pge _ idx2
          rw [heq] at h1
          exact List.Perm.of_cons (h1.symm.trans ((List.Perm.swap x y l).trans h2))

intro idx1 idx2 heq
          let rec h : ∀ (l : List α) (idx : Fin l.length), l.Perm (l[idx] :: l.eraseIdx idx)
            | _::_, ⟨0, _⟩ => .refl _
            | a::as, ⟨i+1, hi⟩ => ((h as ⟨i, Nat.lt_of_succ_lt_succ hi⟩).cons a).trans (.swap a _ _)
          exact List.perm_cons.mp <| (h _ _).symm.trans <| (.swap x y l).trans (h _ _) |>.trans (by rw [heq]; exact .refl _)

intro idx1 idx2 heq
          have h := (List.perm_cons_eraseIdx (y :: x :: l) idx1).trans <|
            (List.Perm.swap x y l).trans (List.perm_cons_eraseIdx (x :: y :: l) idx2).symm
          rw [heq] at h
          exact h.erase ((x :: y :: l)[idx2])
intros; exact list_Perm_eraseIdx (hperm := .swap x y l)

intro idx1 idx2 heq
          exact List.Perm.cons_inv (a := (y :: x :: l)[idx1])
            ((List.perm_cons_eraseIdx _ idx1).symm.trans
            ((List.Perm.swap x y l).trans
            (heq ▸ List.perm_cons_eraseIdx _ idx2)))

simp at heq; subst heq; apply List.Perm.refl
            | succ idx2 =>
              cases idx2 using Fin.cases with
              | zero => apply List.Perm.refl
              | succ idx2 =>
                simp [List.eraseIdx_cons_succ, List.getElem_cons_succ] at heq ⊢; apply List.Perm.cons
                exact (List.perm_middle (l1 := l.take idx2.1) (a := y) (l2 := l.drop (idx2.1 + 1))).symm
          | succ idx1 =>
            cases idx1 using Fin.cases with
            | zero =>
              cases idx2 using Fin.cases with
              | zero => apply List.Perm.refl
              | succ idx2 =>
                cases idx2 using Fin.cases with
                | zero => simp at heq; subst heq; apply List.Perm.refl
                | succ idx2 =>
                  simp [List.eraseIdx_cons_succ, List.getElem_cons_succ] at heq ⊢; apply (List.Perm.swap y x _).trans
                  apply List.Perm.cons; exact (List.perm_middle (l1 := l.take idx2.1) (a := x) (l2 := l.drop (idx2.1 + 1))).symm
            | succ idx1 =>
              cases idx2 using Fin.cases with
              | zero =>
                simp [List.eraseIdx_cons_succ, List.getElem_cons_succ] at heq ⊢; apply List.Perm.cons
                exact (List.perm_middle (l1 := l.take idx1.1) (a := x) (l2 := l.drop (idx1.1 + 1)))
              | succ idx2 =>
                cases idx2 using Fin.cases with
                | zero =>
                  simp [List.eraseIdx_cons_succ, List.getElem_cons_succ] at heq ⊢; apply (List.Perm.swap x y _).trans
                  apply List.Perm.cons; exact (List.perm_middle (l1 := l.take idx1.1) (a := y) (l2 := l.drop (idx1.1 + 1)))
                | succ idx2 =>
                  simp [List.eraseIdx_cons_succ, List.getElem_cons_succ] at heq ⊢; apply (List.Perm.swap y x _).trans
                  apply List.Perm.cons; apply List.Perm.cons
                  apply List.Perm.of_cons (a := l[idx1])
                  exact (List.perm_middle (l1 := l.take idx1.1) (a := l[idx1]) (l2 := l.drop (idx1.1 + 1))).symm.trans
                    (heq ▸ (List.perm_middle (l1 := l.take idx2.1) (a := l[idx2]) (l2 := l.drop (idx2.1 + 1))))

by
            intros idx1 idx2 heq
            have h1 := List.perm_cons_eraseIdx _ idx1.1 idx1.2
            have h2 := List.perm_cons_eraseIdx _ idx2.1 idx2.2
            rw [heq] at h1
            exact List.Perm.cons_inv (h1.symm.trans ((List.Perm.swap x y l).trans h2))

by
          intros idx1 idx2 heq
          apply List.Perm.of_cons (a := (y :: x :: l)[idx1])
          rw [heq]
          exact (List.Perm.cons_eraseIdx idx1).trans
            ((List.Perm.swap x y l).trans (List.Perm.cons_eraseIdx idx2).symm)

intros idx1 idx2 heq
          exact list_Perm_eraseIdx (hperm := List.Perm.swap y x l) (heq := heq)
intro idx1 idx2 h; exact List.perm_cons.mp (h ▸ (List.perm_get_cons_eraseIdx _ idx1).symm.trans ((List.Perm.swap x y l).trans (List.perm_get_cons_eraseIdx _ idx2)))

intros idx1 idx2 h
          apply List.Perm.of_cons (a := (y :: x :: l)[idx1])
          rw [h]
          exact (List.perm_cons_eraseIdx _ idx1).trans ((List.Perm.swap x y l).trans (List.perm_cons_eraseIdx _ idx2).symm)

intros idx1 idx2 heq
          have h {l : List α} (i : Fin l.length) : l.Perm (l[i] :: l.eraseIdx i) := by
            rw [List.eraseIdx_eq_take_drop, ← List.take_append_getElem_drop l i i.isLt]; apply List.perm_middle
          exact List.Perm.cons_inv (heq ▸ (h idx1).symm.trans ((List.Perm.swap x y l).trans (h idx2)))
intros idx1 idx2 heq; exact (heq ▸ (List.perm_cons_eraseIdx _ idx1).symm.trans ((List.Perm.swap x y l).trans (List.perm_cons_eraseIdx _ idx2))).cons_inv

succ n ih => cases l; contradiction; apply (List.Perm.swap _ _ _).trans; apply List.Perm.cons; apply ih ⟨n, by simp_all⟩
          apply List.perm_cons.mp
          rw [← h]
          exact (helper idx1).symm.trans ((List.Perm.swap x y l).trans (helper idx2))

intro i1 i2 heq
          have g {α} (l : List α) (i : Fin l.length) : l.Perm (l[i] :: l.eraseIdx i) := by
            induction l with | nil => intro i; cases i | cons h t IH =>
            intro i; match i with
            | ⟨0, _⟩ => exact List.Perm.refl
            | ⟨i+1, hi⟩ =>
              simp only [List.eraseIdx_cons_succ, List.getElem_cons_succ]
              exact (List.Perm.cons h (IH ⟨i, Nat.lt_of_succ_lt_succ hi⟩)).trans (List.Perm.swap h _ _)
          exact (heq ▸ (g _ i1).symm.trans ((List.Perm.swap x y l).symm.trans (g _ i2))).of_cons

by
            intro i j h
            have aux (l : List α) (i : Nat) (h : i < l.length) : (l.eraseIdx i ++ [l[i]]).Perm l := by
              induction i generalizing l with
              | zero => cases l; contradiction; apply List.Perm.append_comm
              | succ i ih => cases l; contradiction; simp [List.eraseIdx, List.getElem]; apply List.Perm.cons; apply ih
            apply List.Perm.of_append_right [(y :: x :: l)[i]]
            rw [← h]
            exact (aux _ i i.2).trans ((List.Perm.swap x y l).trans (aux _ j j.2).symm)

succ i HR => cases l; contradiction; exact (List.Perm.cons _ (HR _ (Nat.lt_of_succ_lt_succ hi))).trans (List.Perm.swap _ _ _)
          apply (List.perm_cons (y :: x :: l)[idx1]).1
          rw [heq]
          exact (h _ idx1).symm.trans ((List.Perm.swap y x l).trans (h _ idx2))

intros idx1 idx2 h
          have hP := (List.perm_getElem_cons_eraseIdx _ idx1).symm.trans
            ((List.Perm.swap x y l).trans (List.perm_getElem_cons_eraseIdx _ idx2))
          rw [h] at hP
          exact hP.cons_inv

intro idx1 idx2 heq
          exact List.Perm.cons_inv <| heq ▸ (List.perm_getElem_cons_eraseIdx _ idx1).symm.trans
            ((List.Perm.swap x y l).trans (List.perm_getElem_cons_eraseIdx _ idx2))

simp; exact List.Perm.refl _
              | succ i => simp; exact (ih ⟨i, by simpa using hi⟩).cons.trans (List.Perm.swap _ _ _)
          have h_all := (h _ idx1).symm.trans ((List.Perm.swap y x l).trans (h _ idx2))
          rw [heq] at h_all
          exact h_all.of_cons

intros idx1 idx2 h
          apply List.Perm.cons_inv (x := (y :: x :: l).get idx1)
          exact (List.perm_get_cons_eraseIdx (y :: x :: l) idx1).trans
            ((List.Perm.swap y x l).trans (h ▸ List.perm_get_cons_eraseIdx (x :: y :: l) idx2).symm)

intro idx1 idx2 heq
          exact (List.perm_getElem_cons_eraseIdx idx1).symm.trans
            ((List.Perm.swap x y l).symm.trans (heq ▸ List.perm_getElem_cons_eraseIdx idx2)) |>.of_cons

intros idx1 idx2 h
          exact List.Perm.cons_inv (h ▸ (List.perm_cons_eraseIdx _ idx1).trans
            ((List.Perm.swap x y l).trans (List.perm_cons_eraseIdx _ idx2).symm))

intro idx1 idx2 heq
          apply List.Perm.cons_inv (a := (y :: x :: l)[idx1])
          rw [heq]
          exact (List.perm_cons_eraseIdx (y :: x :: l) idx1).trans
            ((List.Perm.swap x y l).trans (List.perm_cons_eraseIdx (x :: y :: l) idx2).symm)

intro idx1 idx2 heq
          apply List.Perm.cons_inv (a := (y :: x :: l)[idx1])
          exact (List.perm_cons_eraseIdx idx1).symm.trans
            ((List.Perm.swap x y l).trans (heq ▸ List.perm_cons_eraseIdx idx2))

intro idx1 idx2 heq
          have h as i : (as : List α).Perm (as[i] :: as.eraseIdx i) := by
            rw [List.eraseIdx_eq_take_drop, ← List.perm_middle (l₁ := as.take i), ← List.drop_eq_getElem_cons i.isLt, List.take_append_drop]
          exact List.Perm.perm_of_cons_perm (heq ▸ (h _ idx1).symm.trans ((List.Perm.swap y x l).trans (h _ idx2)))

simp [List.eraseIdx_cons_succ]
                exact (List.Perm.cons _ (ih ⟨i, Nat.lt_of_succ_lt_succ hi⟩)).trans (List.Perm.swap _ _ _)
          have h1 := h (y :: x :: l) idx1
          have h2 := h (x :: y :: l) idx2
          rw [heq] at h1
          exact List.Perm.of_cons (h1.symm.trans ((List.Perm.swap x y l).trans h2))
